payload.label: picture frame
payload.long_description: Tall, narrow gilded (gold-tone) decorative picture frame holding a multicolored landscape-style image with blue sky at the top and warm brown/yellow architectural tones below; the frame is vertically oriented, occupies most of the crop, appears slightly edge-near/cropped, and seems photographed from about 1.0 m away.

message.content: {"label":"picture frame","short_description":"narrow vertical gilded picture frame","long_description":"Tall, narrow gilded (gold-tone) decorative picture frame holding a multicolored landscape-style image with blue sky at the top and warm brown/yellow architectural tones below; the frame is vertically oriented, occupies most of the crop, appears slightly edge-near/cropped, and seems photographed from about 1.0 m away.","attributes":["gilded gold-tone frame","narrow vertical orientation","decorative/ornate molding","landscape-style image inside","blue sky visible","warm brown/yellow tones","wall-mounted","slightly edge-cropped"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.0}
